# exportToFiles

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether to export to files.

## Declaration

```swift
var exportToFiles: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If the value of this property is `false`, call [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/exportBrowserData(_:)] to send the browser data directly to the browser that the person chooses in the browsing-data transfer sheet.

If the value of this property is `true`, the system cancels the browser-to-browser data exchange. Instead of streaming export data through [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/exportBrowserData(_:)], export the browsing data to disk using a file format of your choosing.

## Configuring export preferences

- **dataTypes**: The set of data types to include in the export.
- **BEExportOptions.DataTypes**: Types of exported browser data.

items.description: The set of data types to include in the export.
